zh.lifeSummary: Ursula Mayer是Johann Ludwig Mayer的女兒，出生。她於1676年與Daniel Kurtz Handelsmann in Ulm在德國爾特波格奧拉赤 烏爾姆烏爾姆結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和8個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Ursula Mayer是Johann Ludwig Mayer的女儿，出生。她于1676年与Daniel Kurtz Handelsmann in Ulm在德国爾特波格奧拉赤 烏爾姆烏爾姆结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和8个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Mayer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Hans, Franz, Helmut, Wilhelm, Erwin, Gerhard, Heinz, Ilse, Lorenz, Wolfgang.

English (Staffordshire): post-medieval form of Mear, which is either a topographic name, from Middle English mere ‘pond, pool’ (Old English mere) or Middle English mere ‘boundary’ (Old English (ge)mǣre), or a habitational name from one or more of the many places with names derived from these terms, such as Mere (Cheshire, Lincolnshire, Wiltshire), Meir in Caverswall (Staffordshire), and Meare (Somerset).
English: occupational name for a physician, from Old French mire, Middle English mire, meir, meyre, originally synonymous with Myer .

variants.name: Mawyer
meanings: Americanized form of German   Mayer  .
Possibly English: variant of Mawer, an occupational name for a reaper or mower, Middle English mawer(e), mower.

variants.name: Prator
meanings: German (Prätor): Latinized (humanistic) form of any of various surnames meaning ‘leader’ or ‘headman’, for example Mayer , Schulz , Richter , and Vogt . It is from Latin praetor, the title of various officials in Republican and Imperial Rome. Compare Pretorius .

variants.name: Mayor
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Pedro, Agapito, Alberto, Cesar, Cosme, Javier, Jorge, Jose, Juan, Manuel, Orlando.
English (Lancashire): variant of   Mayer   1.
Spanish: nickname for an older man or a distinguishing epithet for the elder of two bearers of the same personal name, from mayor ‘older’, from Latin maior (natus), literally ‘greater (by birth)’.

variants.name: Mayers
meanings: English: variant of Mayer , with post-medieval excrescent -s.
Irish and English: variant of   Myers  .
German and Dutch: patronymic from   Mayer  . Compare   Myers  .

variants.name: Mayerson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Meyer, Ronit.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): patronymic from   Mayer  .

variants.name: Mayhorn
meanings: Probably an altered form of German or English (of German origin) Mayern or Meyern, genitivized forms of Mayer and Meyer , or perhaps habitational names from a place so named. The surnames Mayern and Meyern are apparently no longer found in the German-speaking lands.

History: In 1765 in Cambridge, MA, Edward Mayhorn married Abigail Remick (a German surname, see   Remick  ). He may have been of German heritage or mixed English-German. (Compare John Christopher Mayern or Meyerne, German-born, who in the 17th century married into the English Twisleton family of Drax, Yorkshire.)

variants.name: Maier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Otto, Helmut, Manfred, Gerhard, Lothar, Armin, Erwin, Franz, Heinz, Rudi.

German and Dutch (of German origin): variant of   Mayer   (see   Meyer   1). The German surname in this form is also found in some other European countries, e.g. in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and Czechia.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from a variant of the personal name Meyer (see Meyer 2).

variants.name: Mee
meanings: English (mainly East Midlands): occupational name from Middle English mee, meie, mie (Old French mege, mie) ‘physician’. Compare the synonymous Mayer and Myer .

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Miadhaigh ‘descendant of Miadhach’, a personal name meaning ‘honorable’. This name was also adopted for various other Irish names, e.g. Meehan , and also in Ulster for McNamee .

French (Mée): habitational name from any of the places called (Le) Mée in Mayenne, Eure-et-Loir, and Seine-et-Marne, derived from Old French me(i)s ‘farmstead’ (from Latin mansus). This surname is rare in France.

variants.name: Myer
meanings: English, of Norman French origin: occupational name from Old French mire ‘physician’ (Latinized as medicus). Compare Mayer and Mee .
English: topographic name from Middle English mire ‘marsh’ (Old Norse mýrr), denoting a person who lived at or near a marsh.
Americanized form of German   Meyer  ,   Mayer  , or   Maier  .

variants.name: Mear
meanings: English: variant of Mear , with post-medieval excrescent -s.
Irish: from Ó Meidhir ‘descendant of Meidhir’, a personal name based on meidhir ‘mirth’. Compare Myers .

nameMeanings.name: Ursula
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin name Ursula, a diminutive of ursa ‘(she-)bear’. This was the name of a 4th-century saint martyred at Cologne with a number of companions, traditionally said to have been eleven thousand, but more probably just eleven, the exaggeration being due to a misreading of a diacritic mark in an early manuscript. This name was moderately popular in the 16th century, but its use in the English-speaking world today is selective. A more recent influence has been the film actress Ursula Andress ( b. 1936 in Switzerland).

en.lifeSummary: Ursula Mayer was born as the daughter of Johann Ludwig Mayer. She married Daniel Kurtz Handelsmann in Ulm in 1676, in Ulm, Ulm, Württemberg, Germany. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 8 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Ursula Mayer est née, fille de Johann Ludwig Mayer. Elle a épousé Daniel Kurtz Handelsmann in Ulm en 1676, à Ulm, Oberamt Ulm, Württemberg, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 8 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Ursula Mayer wurde, als Tochter von Johann Ludwig Mayer geboren. Sie hat 1676 in Ulm, Oberamt Ulm, Württemberg, Deutschland Daniel Kurtz Handelsmann in Ulm geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 8 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Ursula Mayer è nata il come figlia di Johann Ludwig Mayer. Lei sposato Daniel Kurtz Handelsmann in Ulm nel 1676, nel Ulm, Oberamt Ulm, Württemberg, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 8 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Ursula MayerはJohann Ludwig Mayerの娘として生まれた。1676年にドイツウuルッテンバーグオバーアムト ウルムウルムでDaniel Kurtz Handelsmann in Ulmと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Ursula Mayer(은)는 Johann Ludwig Mayer의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1676년 독일 wu르테버그 오베램트 울름 울름에서 Daniel Kurtz Handelsmann in Ulm(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Ursula Mayer nasceu filha de Johann Ludwig Mayer. Ela casou-se com Daniel Kurtz Handelsmann in Ulm em 1676, em Ulm, Oberamt Ulm, Württemberg, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 8 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Ursula Mayer родилась. Её отца звали Johann Ludwig Mayer. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Daniel Kurtz Handelsmann in Ulm в 1676 г. в местности улм, обирамт улм, вuрттембирг, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 8 дочерей.

es.lifeSummary: Ursula Mayer nació como hija de Johann Ludwig Mayer. Se casó con Daniel Kurtz Handelsmann in Ulm en 1676, en Ulm, Oberamt Ulm, Württemberg, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 8 hijas.
